description:
Why India's Himalayan construction projects are a huge gamble.
For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

Full story here: https://theb1m.com/video/india-himalayas-tunnels

Additional footage and images courtesy of Megha Engineering + Infrastructures Ltd., ABC7, BBC News, Buddy Sagar, CNN News-18, CTV News, Ex Route Adventures, Herrenknecht, Hindustan Times, India Today, Jatin Chaudhary, Ministry of Road Transport and Highways of India, NEWS9, Shubam Bhasin, The Economic Times, Utkarsh Modgil, Vijay Kothare, Vikash Singh and WION.

00:00 - Intro
00:55 - Land of the Gods
02:14 - Tunnel Collapse
03:38 - The Rescue
05:17 - Natural Hazards
06:59 - Human Error
08:06 - Atal Tunnel
09:31 - Zojila Tunnel
11:55 - Silkyara Latest
